violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back exit, was observed with the mesh screen loose and no longer intact and is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
The flooring near the ice machine was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Flooring needs to be repaired. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2023

The cutting boards on the breakfast prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and air circulating fans in the kitchen have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, or other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The door to the toilet room off the kitchen is not self-closing. Door Needs to be self-closing. Door also needs a door sweep due to it close proximity to food preparation and storage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2023
The flooring near the ice machine was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Flooring needs to be repaired. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2023

The produce 1-door reach-in was observed held at an ambient temperature of 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items within the unit were evaluated and any items above or at 45 degrees Fahrenheit were voluntarily disposed of. TCS foods are not to be stored in unit until an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below is achieved. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

Logs of deli meat were observed not marked with the date of opening. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The cutting boards on the breakfast prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and air circulating fans in the kitchen have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The door to the toilet room off the kitchen is not self-closing. Door Needs to be self-closing. Door also needs a door sweep due to it close proximity to food preparation and storage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2023
The flooring near the ice machine was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Flooring needs to be repaired. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2023
